Patch Set 1:

Looking thought the history, I think we need to update lbuild also - https://git.whamcloud.com/?p=fs/lustre-release.git;a=commit;h=01103eba35e88638d8860457fbdf89b101d4ab67

Patch Set 1:

Here is my trimmed down version of the patch Shaun

Patch Set 1:

This is only sufficient to build with zfs-2.3, it will not be able to run

We are now required to set the za_name_len before the object is used.

And the additional places where zap_attribute_t is embedded in osd structs will overflow the flexible array and corrupt our osd data.

Also the library version changed from 5 to 6
Uploaded patch set 2.

Patch Set 2:

Seems like this hit a Clang compiler bug when attempting to generate BPF? I think we need to add a line to lbuild to dump out the files here:

16:46:01 PLEASE ATTACH THE FOLLOWING FILES TO THE BUG REPORT:
16:46:01 Preprocessed source(s) and associated run script(s) are located at:
16:46:01 clang: note: diagnostic msg: /tmp/pyperf180-f342eb.c
16:46:01 clang: note: diagnostic msg: /tmp/pyperf180-f342eb.sh
16:46:01 clang: note: diagnostic msg:

Patch Set 2:

This is the bug - https://lore.kernel.org/all/20240221125942.872918368@linuxfoundation.org/. I don't think this is related to ZFS at all.

parents.subject: LU-18624 build: Update ZFS version to 2.2.7

commit.subject: LU-18515 build: Update ZFS version to 2.3.0
commit.message:
LU-18515 build: Update ZFS version to 2.3.0

Update ZFS version to 2.3.0. The changes are listed in:
https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/releases/tag/zfs-2.3.0

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  env=SANITY_EXCEPT="66 413" \
  clientdistro=el8.10 serverdistro=el8.10 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  env=SANITY_EXCEPT="66 413" \
  clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.4 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.4 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-1

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  env=SANITY_EXCEPT="66 413" \
  clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.4 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-2

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.4 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-3

Change-Id: I12baa77cfb8a864e025cb834b876775c36373bd5
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
